results.text: Adam Valentini - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. It’s hard to overstate how much pressure Valentini applies on the forecheck. He wins inside battles, leverages his low centre of gravity to push larger players off balance, and he’s proactive in his approach, a human fire hydrant who constantly sacrifices his body to make plays. Adam Valentini Hockey Stats and Profile at hockeydb.com. Statistics of Adam Valentini, a hockey player from Toronto, ONT born Apr 11 2008 who was active from 2024 to 2026.
